server/internal/app/app_close.go.reason: App close and shutdown paths need bounded stop contexts after the run context is already canceled.
server/internal/app/app_close.go.target_action: Keep only for shutdown cleanup with explicit timeout.

server/internal/app/app_run_supervisor.g.reason: Nil supervisor fallback returns a non-nil context for defensive callers.
server/internal/app/app_run_supervisor.g.target_action: Prefer constructing a supervisor with an explicit parent context.

server/internal/app/app.go.reason: New delegates to NewWithContext for callers without a cancellable startup context.
server/internal/app/app.go.target_action: Use NewWithContext from cancellable startup paths.

server/internal/app/platform/platform.go.reason: Platform build uses the provided startup context and only falls back for direct nil callers.
server/internal/app/platform/platform.go.target_action: Pass a startup context from app.NewWithContext.

server/internal/app/pluginstack/build.go.reason: Plugin stack build uses the provided startup context and only falls back for direct nil callers.
server/internal/app/pluginstack/build.go.target_action: Pass a startup context from app.NewWithContext.

server/internal/app/renderstack/build.go.reason: Render stack build uses the provided startup context and only falls back for direct nil callers.
server/internal/app/renderstack/build.go.target_action: Pass a startup context from app.NewWithContext.

server/internal/auth/bootstrap.go.reason: Bootstrap and Login wrappers delegate to context-aware methods for non-HTTP callers.
server/internal/auth/bootstrap.go.target_action: Use BootstrapWithContext and LoginWithContext from request paths.

server/internal/auth/context.go.reason: Central auth helper protects direct nil context callers.
server/internal/auth/context.go.target_action: Pass explicit contexts from request and startup paths.

server/internal/auth/manager.go.reason: NewManager delegates to NewManagerWithContext for non-startup callers.

server/internal/auth/sessions.go.reason: Issue, Revoke, and Validate wrappers delegate to context-aware methods for non-HTTP callers.
server/internal/auth/sessions.go.target_action: Use WithContext variants from request paths.

server/internal/bootstrap/lifecycle.go.reason: SignalContext is the process cancellation root for server startup and run.
server/internal/bootstrap/lifecycle.go.target_action: Keep as the only signal-derived server process root.

server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.reason: Event metadata helpers use a non-nil fallback when callers omit context.
server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.target_action: Pass adapter event contexts from call sites when available.

server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.reason: Adapter lifecycle owns process stop and supervisor fallback contexts outside HTTP requests.
server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.target_action: Bind adapter lifecycle to app supervisor context where practical.

server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.reason: Reverse connection loop owns an adapter runtime root outside HTTP requests.
server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.target_action: Keep runtime roots inside adapter lifecycle code only.

server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.reason: Runtime info refresh is an adapter background observation outside request scope.
server/internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/she.target_action: Attach refresh work to adapter lifecycle context when the adapter exposes it.

server/internal/cli/backup.go.reason: Backup command is a synchronous CLI root without a caller context.
server/internal/cli/backup.go.target_action: Introduce command contexts if CLI gains cancellation support.

server/internal/cli/doctor_report.go.reason: Doctor report command is a synchronous CLI root without a caller context.
server/internal/cli/doctor_report.go.target_action: Introduce command contexts if CLI gains cancellation support.

server/internal/deps/manager_inspect.go.reason: Dependency inspection fallbacks resolve system Chromium without a caller context.
server/internal/deps/manager_inspect.go.target_action: Prefer InspectWithContext if dependency diagnostics become request-scoped.

server/internal/deps/manager_prepare.go.reason: Dependency preparation accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/deps/manager_prepare.go.target_action: Pass contexts from system runtime preparation and install tasks.

server/internal/deps/manager_resolve.go.reason: Dependency resolution fallbacks inspect system Chromium without a caller context.
server/internal/deps/manager_resolve.go.target_action: Prefer context-aware resolution from request and task paths.

server/internal/deps/system_chromium.go.reason: System Chromium lookup accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/deps/system_chromium.go.target_action: Pass contexts from dependency manager callers.

server/internal/eventpipeline/chatpolicy.reason: Cooldown check accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/eventpipeline/chatpolicy.target_action: Pass event pipeline contexts from dispatch paths.

server/internal/eventpipeline/dispatch/r.reason: Reload dispatch uses a bounded stop context for runtime cleanup.
server/internal/eventpipeline/dispatch/r.target_action: Keep only for bounded cleanup after a reload decision.

server/internal/eventpipeline/dispatch/s.reason: Scheduler log dispatch accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/eventpipeline/dispatch/s.target_action: Pass scheduler trigger contexts from callers.

server/internal/extensions/menu/builtin_.reason: Menu send extension accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/extensions/menu/builtin_.target_action: Pass event contexts from menu call sites.

server/internal/integrations/douyin/brow.reason: Douyin browser allocator is a browser runtime root outside HTTP request scope.
server/internal/integrations/douyin/brow.target_action: Attach browser runtime lifetime to caller context where the API supports it.

server/internal/integrations/douyin/brow.reason: Douyin browser helper accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/integrations/douyin/brow.target_action: Pass request or task contexts from resolver paths.

server/internal/logging/stream_spool.go.reason: Log spool close uses a bounded cleanup context after runtime cancellation.
server/internal/logging/stream_spool.go.target_action: Keep only for final spool cleanup.

server/internal/logging/stream.go.reason: Log stream close uses a bounded cleanup context after runtime cancellation.
server/internal/logging/stream.go.target_action: Keep only for final stream cleanup.

server/internal/management/ws/console.go.reason: WebSocket CloseRead needs its own read-drain context for the accepted connection.
server/internal/management/ws/console.go.target_action: Keep CloseRead roots isolated to WebSocket handlers.

server/internal/management/ws/events_str.reason: WebSocket CloseRead needs its own read-drain context for the accepted connection.
server/internal/management/ws/events_str.target_action: Keep CloseRead roots isolated to WebSocket handlers.

server/internal/management/ws/logs.go.reason: WebSocket CloseRead needs its own read-drain context for the accepted connection.
server/internal/management/ws/logs.go.target_action: Keep CloseRead roots isolated to WebSocket handlers.

server/internal/management/ws/tasks.go.reason: WebSocket CloseRead needs its own read-drain context for the accepted connection.
server/internal/management/ws/tasks.go.target_action: Keep CloseRead roots isolated to WebSocket handlers.

server/internal/plugins/install/install_.reason: Install catalog refresh accepts job context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/plugins/install/install_.target_action: Pass install task context from execution paths.

server/internal/plugins/install/install..reason: Install service owns a cancellable worker base context that Close cancels.
server/internal/plugins/install/install..target_action: Keep worker roots inside task services with Close cancellation.

server/internal/plugins/lifecycle/plugin.reason: Lifecycle context binding falls back only when the controller is used without app Run.
server/internal/plugins/lifecycle/plugin.target_action: Bind lifecycle context from app.Run in production.

server/internal/plugins/lifecycle/plugin.reason: StopAndResetPluginWithContext protects nil direct callers; production uninstall passes job context.

server/internal/plugins/runtime/spec/spe.reason: BuildSpec wrapper delegates to BuildSpecWithContext for non-request callers.
server/internal/plugins/runtime/spec/spe.target_action: Use BuildSpecWithContext from runtime startup paths.

server/internal/plugins/uninstall/uninst.reason: Uninstall catalog refresh accepts job context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/plugins/uninstall/uninst.target_action: Pass uninstall task context from execution paths.

server/internal/plugins/uninstall/uninst.reason: Uninstall service owns a cancellable worker base context that Close cancels.
server/internal/plugins/uninstall/uninst.target_action: Keep worker roots inside task services with Close cancellation.

server/internal/recovery/recovery.go.reason: Recovery disables incompatible plugins during startup recovery without a request context.
server/internal/recovery/recovery.go.target_action: Pass startup context if recovery becomes part of app.NewWithContext.

server/internal/render/browser/chromium_.reason: Chromium allocator is a browser runtime root outside HTTP request scope.
server/internal/render/browser/chromium_.target_action: Attach allocator lifetime to render request context where the API supports it.

server/internal/render/service/render_se.reason: Render service constructor performs startup template sync before request handling.
server/internal/render/service/render_se.target_action: Pass construction context if NewService becomes context-aware.

server/internal/scheduler/loop.go.reason: Scheduler stop uses a bounded persistence context after loop cancellation.
server/internal/scheduler/loop.go.target_action: Keep only for bounded scheduler cleanup.

server/internal/scheduler/run_result.go.reason: Scheduler result persistence accepts context and falls back only for nil direct callers.
server/internal/scheduler/run_result.go.target_action: Pass scheduler job contexts from execution paths.

server/internal/storage/store_lifecycle..reason: Store close performs final WAL checkpoint after callers are shutting down.
server/internal/storage/store_lifecycle..target_action: Keep only for final storage cleanup.

server/internal/storage/store_open.go.reason: SQLite open configures handles and initializes schema before a caller context exists.
server/internal/storage/store_open.go.target_action: Introduce OpenWithContext if startup cancellation needs to reach storage open.

server/internal/tasks/executor.go.reason: Task executor owns a cancellable worker base context that Close cancels.
server/internal/tasks/executor.go.target_action: Keep worker roots inside task services with Close cancellation.

server/internal/tasks/persistence.go.reason: Task persistence close uses bounded cleanup after worker cancellation.
server/internal/tasks/persistence.go.target_action: Keep only for final task persistence cleanup.
